content.cn_text: 你将听到有关自己动手粉刷房屋的部分广播节目。
content.en_text: You will hear part of a radio programme about Do-It-Yourself house painting.

content.cn_text: 大家早上好，欢迎来到我们每周的家居装修系列。
content.en_text: Speaker: Good morning everyone, and welcome to our weekly series on home improvements.

content.cn_text: 今天的节目是关于自己动手粉刷房子。对于喜欢自己做室内油漆的人来说，从来没有比现在更好的时机了。
content.en_text: Today's programme is about Do-It-Yourself house painting ... There's never been a better time for people who like to do their own interior house painting.

content.cn_text: 虽然人们仍然过着忙碌的生活，但由于各种新型DIY材料的出现，你现在可以用更高效、更环保的方式装饰你的家。
content.en_text: Although people still lead very busy lives, thanks to the availability of various new DIY materials, you can now decorate your home in a more efficient and a more environmentally-friendly way.

content.cn_text: 仅2009年一年，在英国销售的油漆中就有大约5300万升没有受到污染，这足以填满21个奥运会标准的游泳池。
content.en_text: In two thousand and nine alone, approximately fifty-three million litres of the paint that was sold in the UK were left untouched - that's enough to fill twenty one Olympic-sized swimming pools.

content.cn_text: 如果你用猜测的方法来装饰你的房间，很容易高估你需要多少油漆。
content.en_text: It's easy to overestimate how much paint you'll need to decorate your room if you use guesswork.

content.cn_text: 如果你确切地知道需要多少油漆，你就避免了不必要的浪费。
content.en_text: And if you know exactly how much paint is needed, you avoid unnecessary waste.

content.cn_text: 现在有自动油漆计算器可用-大多数主要油漆制造商提供它们-看看他们的网站，或者只是谷歌“油漆计算器”，看看会出现什么。
content.en_text: There are automatic paint calculators available now - most of the major paint manufacturers provide them - look on their websites, or just google 'paint calculator' and see what comes up.

content.cn_text: 然后简单地测量房间的周长和高度(以米为单位)，将其与你要粉刷的表面类型一起输入计算器，它会告诉你需要多少升油漆。
content.en_text: Then simply measure the circumference and height of the room in metres, enter this into the calculator along with the type of surface you're painting, and it will tell you how many litres of paint you'll need.

content.cn_text: 但如果你最终留下了剩余的油漆，你可以把它捐赠给社区重新油漆这样的组织。
content.en_text: But if you do end up with leftover paint, you can donate it to an organisation like Community RePaint.

content.cn_text: 他们会把你的油漆重新分配给当地的慈善机构和志愿组织，所以这些油漆会有一个好的归宿。
content.en_text: They will take the paint from you and redistribute it to local charities and voluntary organisations, so it goes to a good home.

content.cn_text: 你可以在communityrepaint上找到更多关于Community RePaint的信息-都是一个词- dot org。uk。
content.en_text: You can find more information about Community RePaint on communityrepaint - all one word - dot org dot uk.

content.cn_text: 另一种避免油漆浪费的方法是在开始油漆之前检查你对颜色的选择是否完全满意。
content.en_text: Speaker: Another way of avoiding paint wastage is to check you're completely happy with your colour choice before starting to paint.

content.cn_text: 例如，你可以得到一个你想要使用的颜色的小样本，然后在一个板上涂漆，并在房间里移动它，这样你就可以看到它在你的家具和不同的光线下是什么样子。
content.en_text: For example, you can get a small sample of the colour you're thinking of using, then paint a board and move it around the room, so you can see how it looks against your furnishings, and in different lights.

content.cn_text: 此外，买高质量的油漆总是更好的，因为一分钱一分货。
content.en_text: Also,it's always better to buy high quality paints, because you get what you pay for.

content.cn_text: 如果你买的是便宜的油漆，你可能需要涂两到三层才能达到一层优质油漆的效果。
content.en_text: If you buy cheap paint you might need to apply two or three coats to achieve the same coverage that you'd get from one coat of a good-quality paint.

content.cn_text: 你也可以花一周的时间去完成一项本来一两天就能完成的工作。
content.en_text: You could also spend a week on a job that could have been done in a day or two.

content.cn_text: 再考虑一下环境。
content.en_text: And consider the environment.

content.cn_text: 大多数涂料制造商现在都销售不含有害化学物质或散发有害气味的水性涂料，所以买一种吧。
content.en_text: Most paint manufacturers now sell water-based paints that don't contain harmful chemicals or give off harmful odours, so get one of these.

content.cn_text: 你也可以买用可回收容器包装的油漆。
content.en_text: You can also buy paint that's packaged in recyclable containers.

content.cn_text: 现在的选择比以前多得多了。
content.en_text: There's a lot more choice than there used to be.

content.cn_text: 只有在喷漆前彻底准备好表面，你才能把工作做好，使之持久。
content.en_text: You can only do a good job, which will last, if you prepare the surfaces thoroughly before painting.

content.cn_text: 事实上，在很多方面，如果你想做一个看起来很专业的工作，这比绘画本身更重要。
content.en_text: In fact, in many ways if you want to do a professional-looking job, this is more important than the painting itself.

content.cn_text: 如果有任何裂缝或松动的灰泥，涂上油漆也解决不了问题。
content.en_text: If there are any cracks or patches of loose plaster,painting over them won't solve the problem.

content.cn_text: 把石膏拿出来，填满洞，让新石膏有足够的时间晾干。
content.en_text: Take the plaster out and fill the holes,allowing enough time for the new plaster to dry.

content.cn_text: 如果墙壁满是灰尘或油腻，你就不会得到光滑的表面，所以用水清洗是不够的。
content.en_text: And you won't get a smooth finish if the walls are dusty or greasy, so washing with water isn't enough.

content.cn_text: 使用装饰皂溶液，然后用温水冲洗干净。
content.en_text: Use a solution of decorator's soap and rinse well with warm water afterwards.

content.cn_text: 当你准备好粉刷时，我们建议你使用中桩滚筒来粉刷墙壁和天花板。
content.en_text: When you're ready to paint, we suggest you use a medium-pile roller for walls and ceilings.

content.cn_text: 很多人倾向于使用短堆滚筒，但这些给一个不完整的完成，浪费油漆和时间。
content.en_text: A lot of people tend to use short-pile rollers, but these give a patchy finish, and that wastes paint and time.

content.cn_text: 同样，长桩滚筒可以制造出厚实、有质感的效果，看起来很凌乱。
content.en_text: Similarly, long-pile rollers can create a thick, textured effect,which looks messy.

content.cn_text: 刷子也是一样。
content.en_text: The same goes for brushes.

content.cn_text: 刷毛越结实，就越容易清洗和重复使用。
content.en_text: The stronger the bristles, the easier they are to wash and reuse.

content.cn_text: 当你选择了水性涂料，用冷水清洗你的刷子，因为这样更节能。
content.en_text: And as you've chosen a water-based paint, clean your brushes with cold water, because it's more energy-efficient that way.

content.cn_text: 在你装饰的时候，把少量的油漆倒入托盘里，需要的时候再加满。
content.en_text: As you're decorating, keep transferring small amounts of paint into a tray and keep topping it up when you need to.

content.cn_text: 这减少了它被灰尘和污垢污染的机会。最后，水性涂料没有残留的气味，所以这不再是一个问题，但是空气流动而不是热量可以帮助涂料更快地干燥，所以为了帮助在最快的时间内完成工作，请打开门窗。
content.en_text: This reduces the chance of it being contaminated by dust and pieces of dirt ... And finally, water-based paint doesn't have a lingering smell, so that's not an issue any more, but it's air flow rather than heat that helps the paint dry quicker, so to help finish the job in the quickest time leave your doors and windows open.

content.cn_text: 油漆干得越快，工作完成得越快，你就能越快开始享受你的房间!
content.en_text: The faster the paint is dry and the job finished, the quicker you can start enjoying your room!

content.cn_text: 在明天的节目中，我将给出一些建议……
content.en_text: In tomorrow's programme I'll be giving some advice ...

groups.desc:
Questions 11-14
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: According to the speaker, why is it a good time for D-l-Y painting?

options.title: A
options.content: There are better products available now.

options.title: B
options.content: Materials cost less than they used to.

options.title: C
options.content: People have more free time than before.

items.analysis: 文中提到现在是DIY绘画的好时机，原因是有了各种新的DIY材料，使得家居装修变得更加高效和环保。这直接对应了选项A中提到的"现在有更好的产品可用"。新材料的出现使得DIY绘画变得更容易，即使在人们生活仍然很忙碌的情况下，也能更有效地进行家居装修。

items.title: What happened in 2009 in the UK?

options.title: A
options.content: A record volume of paint was sold

options.title: B
options.content: A large amount of paint was wasted.

options.title: C
options.content: There was a major project to repaint public buildings.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出2009年英国有大量售出的油漆未被使用，数量高达5300万升。这个数量被比喻为可以填满21个奥运会规模的游泳池，说明未使用的油漆量非常庞大。未使用的油漆意味着浪费，因此B选项"A large amount of paint was wasted"（大量油漆被浪费）是正确答案。

items.title: What does the speaker say about paint quantity?

options.title: A
options.content: It's not necessary to have exact room measurements.

options.title: B
options.content: It's better to overestimate than to underestimate.

options.title: C
options.content: An automatic calculator can be downloaded from the Internet.

items.analysis: 文中明确提到了可以通过谷歌搜索"油漆计算器"，这意味着这种工具可以在互联网上获取。虽然原文没有直接使用"download"这个词，但"google 'paint calculator'"这个表述暗示了可以通过互联网获取（即下载或使用）这种计算器。因此，选项C最准确地反映了原文的意思。

items.title: What does Community RePaint do?

options.title: A
options.content: It paints people's houses without payment.

options.title: B
options.content: It collects unwanted paint and gives it away.

options.title: C
options.content: It sells unused paint and donates the money to charity.

items.analysis: Community RePaint的主要功能是收集未使用的油漆并将其重新分发。原文中明确指出他们会"take the paint from you"（从你那里收集油漆）和"redistribute it"（重新分发），这与选项B"It collects unwanted paint and gives it away"（收集不需要的油漆并将其赠送）完全吻合。因此，B选项是正确答案。

groups.title: What TWO pieces of advice does the speaker give about paint?

collect_options.title: What TWO pieces of advice does the speaker give about paint?

list.title: B
list.content: Test the colour before buying a lot.

list.title: E
list.content: Buy enough paint for more than one application.

items.analysis: 这道题要求选择两个关于油漆的建议。根据原文，演讲者给出了两个明确的建议：一是在大规模购买之前先测试颜色样品，二是选择水性漆。这两个建议分别对应选项B和D。演讲者强调了在不同光线和家具背景下测试颜色的重要性，以及水性漆对环境和健康的好处，这符合题目要求的"建议"性质。
这道题要求选择两个关于油漆的建议。根据原文，演讲者给出了两个明确的建议：一是在大规模购买之前先测试颜色样品，二是选择水性漆。这两个建议分别对应选项B和D。演讲者强调了在不同光线和家具背景下测试颜色的重要性，以及水性漆对环境和健康的好处，这符合题目要求的"建议"性质。

groups.title: What TWO pieces of advice does the speaker give about preparation?

collect_options.title: What TWO pieces of advice does the speaker give about preparation?

list.title: B
list.content: Don't spend too long preparing surfaces.

list.title: C
list.content: Use decorators' soap to remove grease from walls.

list.title: D
list.content: Wash dirty walls with warm water.

list.title: E
list.content: Paint over cracks and small holes.

items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是A和C，因为原文中明确提到了这两点建议。对于A选项，原文指出需要处理松动的石膏并填补孔洞；对于C选项，原文建议使用装饰工人专用的肥皂溶液来清洁墙壁。这两个建议都是为了确保在开始粉刷之前，墙面得到充分的准备，以获得最佳的粉刷效果。
这道题的正确答案是A和C，因为原文中明确提到了这两点建议。对于A选项，原文指出需要处理松动的石膏并填补孔洞；对于C选项，原文建议使用装饰工人专用的肥皂溶液来清洁墙壁。这两个建议都是为了确保在开始粉刷之前，墙面得到充分的准备，以获得最佳的粉刷效果。

groups.title: What TWO pieces of advice does the speaker give about painting?

collect_options.title: What TWO pieces of advice does the speaker give about painting?

list.title: A
list.content: Put a heater in the room.

list.title: C
list.content: Use a roller with a short pile.

list.title: D
list.content: Apply paint directly from the tin.

items.analysis: 文中提供了多条关于油漆的建议，其中最明确的两条是使用冷水清洗画笔和打开门窗。使用冷水清洗画笔不仅适用于水性漆，而且更加节能。打开门窗则可以加快油漆干燥的过程，从而更快地完成工作。这两条建议直接对应了选项B和E，因此它们是正确答案。
文中提供了多条关于油漆的建议，其中最明确的两条是使用冷水清洗画笔和打开门窗。使用冷水清洗画笔不仅适用于水性漆，而且更加节能。打开门窗则可以加快油漆干燥的过程，从而更快地完成工作。这两条建议直接对应了选项B和E，因此它们是正确答案。
